channel.title: Networking on VPN Setup Tutorial
channel.description: Recent content in Networking on VPN Setup Tutorial

item.title: VPN Setup Tutorial
item.description: VPN Setup Tutorial: A Practical Guide This tutorial guides you through setting up a secure VPN using WireGuard. Prerequisites AWS Server (Ubuntu). Ubuntu Client. Linux Command Knowledge. Steps Launch an AWS EC2 Instance. Install WireGuard on the Server and Client. Configure the server with the required keys. Test the VPN using curl ifconfig.me. Enjoy secure, encrypted connections!
